title: Dobot TCP/IP Remote Control Interface Commands

commands.name: EnableRobot
commands.description: Enable the robot. Required before executing any queue commands (motion, IO, etc.).

parameters.name: load
parameters.description: Load weight. Must not exceed robot model's load range. Unit: kg.

parameters.name: centerX
parameters.description: Eccentric distance in X-axis direction. Range: -500 to 500. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: centerY
parameters.description: Eccentric distance in Y-axis direction. Range: -500 to 500. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: centerZ
parameters.description: Eccentric distance in Z-axis direction. Range: -500 to 500. Unit: mm.

commands.name: DisableRobot
commands.description: Disable the robot.

commands.name: ClearError
commands.description: Clear the alarms of the robot. After clearing, use Continue command to restart the motion queue. Some alarms cannot be cleared without resolving the root cause or restarting the controller.

commands.name: ResetRobot
commands.description: Stop the robot and clear the planned command queue.

commands.name: RunScript
commands.description: Run the specified project.

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Name of the project to run.

commands.name: StopScript
commands.description: Stop running the current project.

commands.name: PauseScript
commands.description: Pause the running project.

commands.name: ContinueScript
commands.description: Continue running the paused project.

commands.name: Pause
commands.description: Pause motion commands not delivered by project (e.g. TCP motion commands), without clearing the motion queue.

commands.name: Continue
commands.description: Continue running the motion command paused by the Pause command.

commands.name: StartDrag
commands.description: Enter drag mode. Cannot be used when robot is in error status.

commands.name: StopDrag
commands.description: Exit drag mode. Cannot be used when robot is in error status.

commands.name: EmergencyStop
commands.description: Emergency stop the robot arm. Robot will power off and alarm. Must clear alarm before re-enabling.

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Delay the command queue for a specified time. Supported by controller V1.5.9 and above.

commands.name: SpeedFactor
commands.description: Set global speed ratio. Affects both jog and playback speeds. Only valid in current TCP/IP control mode.

commands.name: User
commands.description: Set the global user coordinate system. Only valid in current TCP/IP control mode. Returns -1 if index does not exist.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the calibrated user coordinate system. Must be calibrated in software first.

commands.name: Tool
commands.description: Set the global tool coordinate system. Only valid in current TCP/IP control mode. Returns -1 if index does not exist.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the calibrated tool coordinate system. Must be calibrated in software first.

commands.name: SetPayLoad
commands.description: Set the load of the robot arm.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Load weight. Must not exceed robot model's load range. Unit: kg.

commands.name: AccJ
commands.description: Set acceleration ratio of joint motion. Default is 100 when not set.

commands.name: AccL
commands.description: Set acceleration ratio of linear and arc motion. Default is 100 when not set.

commands.name: SpeedJ
commands.description: Set speed ratio of joint motion. Default is 100 when not set.

commands.name: SpeedL
commands.description: Set speed ratio of linear and arc motion. Default is 100 when not set.

commands.name: Arch
commands.description: Set the index of global jump parameter for Jump motion. Default is 0 when not set.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Jump parameter index. Must be set in software before use.

commands.name: CP
commands.description: Set the continuous path (CP) ratio. Controls whether robot transitions at right angle or curved when passing through intermediate points during continuous motion. Invalid for Jump motion. Default is 0.

commands.name: SetArmOrientation
commands.description: Set the hand system (arm orientation) of the target point for M1 Pro robot. Determines unique posture when target is a Cartesian coordinate point.
commands.notes: This command is for M1 Pro only.

commands.name: SetCollisionLevel
commands.description: Set the collision detection level. Only valid in current TCP/IP control mode.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: 0: disable collision detection. 1–5: sensitivity level (higher number = higher sensitivity).

commands.name: SetUser
commands.description: Modify the specified user coordinate system. Supported by controller V1.6.0 and above.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of user coordinate system. Range: [0, 9]. Index 0 is the base coordinate system.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: New user coordinate system values. Format: {x, y, z, r}. Recommended to obtain via CalcUser command.

commands.name: CalcUser
commands.description: Calculate a new user coordinate system by offsetting an existing one. Supported by controller V1.6.0 and above.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of user coordinate system. Range: [0, 9].

parameters.name: matrix_direction
parameters.description: 1: left multiplication (deflect along base coordinate system). 0: right multiplication (deflect along itself).

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: Offset values. Format: {x, y, z, r}.

commands.name: SetTool
commands.description: Modify the specified tool coordinate system. Supported by controller V1.6.0 and above.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of tool coordinate system. Range: [0, 9]. Index 0 is the flange coordinate system.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: New tool coordinate system values. Format: {x, y, z, r}. Recommended to obtain via CalcTool command.

commands.name: CalcTool
commands.description: Calculate a new tool coordinate system by offsetting an existing one. Supported by controller V1.6.0 and above.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of tool coordinate system. Range: [0, 9].

parameters.name: matrix_direction
parameters.description: 1: left multiplication (deflect along flange coordinate system). 0: right multiplication (deflect along itself).

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: Offset values. Format: {x, y, z, r}.

commands.name: RobotMode
commands.description: Get the current status of the robot.

commands.name: GetAngle
commands.description: Get the joint coordinates of the current posture.

commands.name: GetPose
commands.description: Get the Cartesian coordinates of the current posture in specified coordinate systems.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: Index of calibrated user coordinate system. Defaults to global user coordinate system.

parameters.name: Tool
parameters.description: Index of calibrated tool coordinate system. Defaults to global tool coordinate system.

commands.name: GetErrorID
commands.description: Get current error codes of the robot. Returns alarm info for controller, algorithm, and four servo joints.
commands.notes: Collision detection alarm value is -2. First array is controller/algorithm alarms. Last four arrays are servo alarms per joint.

commands.name: PositiveSolution
commands.syntax: PositiveSolution(J1, J2, J3, J4, User, Tool)
commands.description: Forward kinematics: calculate Cartesian coordinates of the robot end based on given joint angles.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: Index of calibrated user coordinate system.

parameters.name: Tool
parameters.description: Index of calibrated tool coordinate system.

commands.name: InverseSolution
commands.syntax: InverseSolution(X, Y, Z, R, User, Tool, isJointNear, JointNear)
commands.description: Inverse kinematics: calculate joint angles based on given Cartesian coordinates. Selects solution closest to current or specified joint angles.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: Index of calibrated user coordinate system.

parameters.name: Tool
parameters.description: Index of calibrated tool coordinate system.

parameters.name: isJointNear
parameters.description: 0 or null: use current joint angle to select solution. 1: use JointNear data to select solution.

parameters.name: JointNear
parameters.description: Reference joint coordinates for solution selection.

commands.name: PalletCreate
commands.syntax: PalletCreate(P1, P2, P3, P4, row=0, col=0, Palletname)
commands.description: Create a pallet grid. Defines all pallet points automatically from 4 corner coordinates. Up to 20 pallets can be created. All pallets are deleted when exiting TCP mode. Supported by controller V1.6.0 and above.

parameters.name: P1
parameters.description: Cartesian coordinates of corner P1. Format: {X, Y, Z, R}.

parameters.name: P2
parameters.description: Cartesian coordinates of corner P2. Same format as P1.

parameters.name: P3
parameters.description: Cartesian coordinates of corner P3. Same format as P1.

parameters.name: P4
parameters.description: Cartesian coordinates of corner P4. Same format as P1.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Number of rows in the pallet.

parameters.name: col
parameters.description: Number of columns in the pallet.

commands.return: ErrorID,{number},PalletCreate(...); where {number} = total pallets created so far.

commands.name: GetPalletPose
commands.description: Get Cartesian coordinates of a specific point in a created pallet. Supported by controller V1.6.0 and above.

commands.name: DO
commands.description: Set the status of a digital output port (queue command — executes in sequence).

commands.name: DOExecute
commands.description: Set the status of a digital output port immediately, regardless of current command queue.

commands.name: DOGroup
commands.syntax: DOGroup(index1, value1, index2, value2, ..., indexN, valueN)
commands.description: Set the status of multiple digital output ports simultaneously (immediate command).

commands.name: ToolDO
commands.description: Set the status of a tool digital output port (queue command).

commands.name: ToolDOExecute
commands.description: Set the status of a tool digital output port immediately, regardless of current command queue.

commands.name: DI
commands.description: Get the status of a digital input port.
commands.return: ErrorID,{value},DI(index); where value: 0 = no signal, 1 = signal.

commands.name: ToolDI
commands.description: Get the status of a tool digital input port.
commands.return: ErrorID,{value},ToolDI(index); where value: 0 = no signal, 1 = signal.

commands.name: ModbusCreate
commands.description: Create a Modbus master and establish connection with a slave. Supports up to 5 devices.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the slave station.

commands.return: ErrorID,{index},ModbusCreate(...); where index is master index (0–4).

commands.name: ModbusClose
commands.description: Disconnect from Modbus slave and release the master.

commands.name: GetInBits
commands.description: Read discrete input (contact register) values from Modbus slave.

parameters.name: addr
parameters.description: Starting address of the contact register.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of values to read. Range: [1, 16].

commands.name: GetInRegs
commands.description: Read input register values with specified data type from Modbus slave.

parameters.name: addr
parameters.description: Starting address of the input register.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of values to read. Range: [1, 4].

parameters.name: valType
parameters.description: null/U16: 16-bit uint; U32: 32-bit uint; F32: 32-bit float; F64: 64-bit double.

commands.name: GetCoils
commands.description: Read coil register values from Modbus slave.

parameters.name: addr
parameters.description: Starting address of the coil register.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of values to read. Range: [1, 16].

commands.name: SetCoils
commands.description: Write values to coil register addresses on Modbus slave.

parameters.name: addr
parameters.description: Starting address of the coil register.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of values to write. Range: [1, 16].

commands.name: GetHoldRegs
commands.description: Read holding register values with specified data type from Modbus slave.

parameters.name: addr
parameters.description: Starting address of the holding register.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of values to read. Range: [1, 4].

parameters.name: valType
parameters.description: null/U16: 16-bit uint; U32: 32-bit uint; F32: 32-bit float; F64: 64-bit double.

commands.name: SetHoldRegs
commands.description: Write values to holding register addresses on Modbus slave with specified data type.

parameters.name: addr
parameters.description: Starting address of the holding register.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of values to write. Range: [1, 4].

parameters.name: valType
parameters.description: null/U16: 16-bit uint; U32: 32-bit uint; F32: 32-bit float; F64: 64-bit double.

commands.name: MovJ
commands.syntax: MovJ(X, Y, Z, R, User=index, Tool=index, SpeedJ=R, AccJ=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Move from current position to target Cartesian position via joint motion. Non-linear trajectory; all joints complete simultaneously.

commands.name: MovL
commands.syntax: MovL(X, Y, Z, R, User=index, Tool=index, SpeedL=R, AccL=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Move from current position to target Cartesian position via linear motion.

commands.name: JointMovJ
commands.syntax: JointMovJ(J1, J2, J3, J4, SpeedJ=R, AccJ=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Move from current position to target joint position via joint motion.

commands.name: MovLIO
commands.syntax: MovLIO(X, Y, Z, R, {Mode,Distance,Index,Status}, ..., User=index, Tool=index, SpeedL=R, AccL=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Linear motion to target Cartesian position with DO triggers at specified distances during motion.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Trigger mode. 0: distance percentage, 1: distance value.

parameters.name: Distance
parameters.description: Positive: from start. Negative: from target. Mode 0: percentage (0,100]. Mode 1: mm.

commands.name: MovJIO
commands.syntax: MovJIO(X, Y, Z, R, {Mode,Distance,Index,Status}, ..., User=index, Tool=index, SpeedJ=R, AccJ=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Joint motion to target Cartesian position with DO triggers at specified distances during motion.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Trigger mode. 0: distance percentage, 1: distance value.

parameters.name: Distance
parameters.description: Positive: from start. Negative: from target. Mode 0: percentage (0,100]. Mode 1: mm.

commands.name: Arc
commands.syntax: Arc(X1, Y1, Z1, R1, X2, Y2, Z2, R2, User=index, Tool=index, SpeedL=R, AccL=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Move from current position to target via arc interpolation. Current position, through point (P1), and target point (P2) define the arc. The three points must not be collinear.

parameters.name: X1
parameters.description: X of arc through point. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: Y1
parameters.description: Y of arc through point. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: Z1
parameters.description: Z of arc through point. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: R1
parameters.description: R of arc through point. Unit: °.

parameters.name: X2
parameters.description: X of target point. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: Y2
parameters.description: Y of target point. Unit: mm.

parameters.name: Z2
parameters.description: Z of target point. Unit: mm.

commands.name: Circle
commands.description: Move from current position in a full circle and return. Circle defined by current position and two specified points. Points must not be collinear, and circle must stay within robot range.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of circles to complete. Must be integer ≥ 1.

parameters.name: X1,Y1,Z1,R1
parameters.description: Cartesian coordinates of P1. Unit: mm/°.

parameters.name: X2,Y2,Z2,R2
parameters.description: Cartesian coordinates of P2. Unit: mm/°.

commands.name: MoveJog
commands.description: Continuously jog the robot arm along a specified axis. Stops when MoveJog() (empty) is sent. Supported by controller V1.5.6 and above.

parameters.name: axisID
parameters.description: Axis and direction. Options: J1+, J1-, J2+, J2-, J3+, J3-, J4+, J4-, X+, X-, Y+, Y-, Z+, Z-, R+, R-.

parameters.name: CoordType
parameters.description: Coordinate system for Cartesian axes. 0: user coordinate system, 1: tool coordinate system.

commands.name: Sync
commands.description: Block execution until all queued commands have been completed. Use before immediate commands that require all motion to be finished first.

commands.name: RelMovJUser
commands.syntax: RelMovJUser(OffsetX, OffsetY, OffsetZ, OffsetR, User, SpeedJ=R, AccJ=R, Tool=index, CP=R)
commands.description: Relative motion along user coordinate system axes with joint motion end. Supported by controller V1.5.6 and above.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: Index of calibrated user coordinate system.

commands.name: RelMovLUser
commands.syntax: RelMovLUser(OffsetX, OffsetY, OffsetZ, OffsetR, User, SpeedL=R, AccL=R, Tool=index, CP=R)
commands.description: Relative motion along user coordinate system axes with linear motion end. Supported by controller V1.5.6 and above.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: Index of calibrated user coordinate system.

commands.name: RelJointMovJ
commands.syntax: RelJointMovJ(Offset1, Offset2, Offset3, Offset4, SpeedJ=R, AccJ=R, CP=R)
commands.description: Relative motion along each joint axis with joint motion. Supported by controller V1.5.6 and above.

commands.name: MovJExt
commands.description: Control the sliding rail (extended axis) to move to target angle or distance.

parameters.name: Angle|Distance
parameters.description: Target angle (°) or distance (mm) depending on extended axis type.

parameters.name: Sync
parameters.description: 0: async (return immediately). 1: sync (wait for completion). Default: 0.

commands.name: SyncAll
commands.description: Block execution until ALL queued commands are executed, including extended axis commands. Use instead of Sync() when extended axes are involved to guarantee both robot arm and extended axis complete their motion.

error_codes.description: ErrorID returned in every command response. Format: ErrorID,{value},CommandName(...);

codes.label: Fail to get
codes.description: Failed to receive or execute the command.

codes.label: Parameter number error
codes.description: The number of parameters in the command is incorrect.

codes.label: Parameter type error (param 1)
codes.description: -30000 = parameter type error. Last digit indicates which parameter is wrong. E.g. -30001 = first parameter type is incorrect.

codes.label: Parameter type error (param 2)
codes.description: Type of the second parameter is incorrect.

codes.label: Parameter type error (param N)
codes.description: Type of the Nth parameter is incorrect.

codes.label: Parameter range error (param 1)
codes.description: -40000 = parameter range error. Last digit indicates which parameter is out of range. E.g. -40001 = first parameter range is incorrect.

codes.label: Parameter range error (param 2)
codes.description: Range of the second parameter is incorrect.

codes.label: Parameter range error (param N)
codes.description: Range of the Nth parameter is incorrect.

notes: Collision detection alarm value is -2 (returned inside GetErrorID).
For controller/algorithm alarms see alarm_controller.json on controller.
For servo alarms see alarm_servo.json on controller.

realtime_feedback.description: Ports 30004/30005/30006 push 1440-byte packets. Data is little-endian (LSB first).

fields.name: DigitalInputs
fields.description: Current status of all digital inputs. Each bit = one port. 1=signal, 0=no signal.

fields.name: DigitalOutputs
fields.description: Current status of all digital outputs. Each bit = one port.

fields.name: RobotMode
fields.description: Robot mode value. See RobotMode command for value definitions.

fields.name: TestValue
fields.description: Memory structure test value. Should equal 0x0123456789ABCDEF.

fields.name: TCPSpeedActual
fields.description: TCP actual speed in Cartesian coordinate system.

fields.name: TCPForce
fields.description: TCP force value (calculated from joint current).

fields.name: BrakeStatus
fields.description: Robot brake status per joint (bitmask). Bit layout: [7-6=reserved, 5=J1, 4=J2, 3=J3, 2=J4, 1-0=reserved]. 1=brake on. E.g. 0x04 = J4 brake on.

fields.name: CenterX
fields.description: End load X-direction eccentric distance. Unit: mm.

fields.name: CenterY
fields.description: End load Y-direction eccentric distance. Unit: mm.

fields.name: CenterZ
fields.description: End load Z-direction eccentric distance. Unit: mm.

realtime_feedback.di_do_bit_description: DI/DO each occupies 8 bytes (64 bits). Each bit = one port status. 1=signal present, 0=no signal. First byte bits 0-7 = ports 1-8, etc.
